## Skill Info

- **Name:**
- **GitHub URL:**
- **Category:** (exchanges / defi / chains / wallets / analytics / trading / payments / mcp-servers / identity / prediction-markets / social / ai-crypto / dev-tools)
- **Official?** Yes / No (is this from the project's own team?)

## Description

One or two sentences about what this skill does.

## Install Command (if applicable)

```bash
# e.g., clawhub install my-skill
# e.g., claude mcp add my-server https://...
```

## Checklist

- [ ] Repo contains a `SKILL.md` with name and description
- [ ] No hardcoded API keys or private keys in the code
- [ ] Open source or publicly accessible
